isi.lyrics:
Lyric Min Jiwoon - How Far Would You Go

Romanization

Morning comes, I’m on the run
From the weight I can’t outrun
Tie my fear with borrowed pride
Tell myself I’m doing fine

Empty chair at dinner time
Bills stacked higher than my life
I said “I’ll be home real soon”
But soon keeps moving out of view

Let me wait, Let me pray
I’d never even look at twice
I’ll bet it all

How far would you go, would you run?
From the man you were, aren’t you lost?
I will never die, no
I refuse to fall
If I get it all,
Could I forgive myself?

I didn’t want the crown
I just didn’t want to fall apart
Somewhere between the need and a little shame in myself
I wouldn’t feel the weight I carried under
There ain’t no mercy in my heart

I kept saying,
“Just this one time”
(I can't stop, no)
"Just one more time"
Let me wait, Let me pray
I’d never even look at twice
I’ll bet it all

How far would you go, would you run?

I will never die, no
I refuse to fall
If I get it all,
Could I forgive myself?

Morning comes, I’m on the run
From the weight I can’t outrun
Tie my fear with borrowed pride
Tell myself I’m doing fine

Empty chair at dinner time
Bills stacked higher than my life
I said “I’ll be home real soon”
But soon keeps moving out of view

Let me wait, Let me pray
I’d never even look at twice
I’ll bet it all

How far would you go, would you run?
From the man you were, aren’t you lost?
I will never die, no
I refuse to fall
If I get it all,
Could I forgive myself?

I didn’t want the crown
I just didn’t want to fall apart
Somewhere between the need and a little shame in myself
I wouldn’t feel the weight I carried under
There ain’t no mercy in my heart

I kept saying,
“Just this one time”
(I can't stop, no)
"Just one more time"
Let me wait, Let me pray
I’d never even look at twice
I’ll bet it all

How far would you go, would you run?
From the man you were, aren’t you lost?
I will never die, no
I refuse to fall
If I get it all,
Could I forgive myself?

(Just one more time..)

Could I forgive myself?
